---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for NovaPanel
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the scenario where this feature would be used.

- **Who benefits:** (e.g., administrators, end users, resellers)
- **How often:** (e.g., daily, during setup, occasionally)

## Mockups / Examples

If applicable, add mockups, screenshots, or examples from other tools.

## Additional Context

Any other information or context about the feature request.
